product1.name: Ficus Elástica
product1.description: Planta de interior resistente con hojas verdes brillantes. Ideal para espacios luminosos.

product2.name: Planta Colgante Verde
product2.description: Planta decorativa colgante que aporta frescura y vida a cualquier ambiente.

product3.name: Peperomia Variegada
product3.description: Planta pequeña con hojas verdes y crema. Perfecta para escritorios o espacios pequeños.

product4.name: Zamioculca
product4.description: Planta elegante y de bajo mantenimiento, ideal para interiores modernos.

product5.name: Sansevieria
product5.description: Planta resistente que purifica el aire. Perfecta para principiantes.

product6.name: Snake Plant
product6.description: A striking and virtually indestructible houseplant with tall, upright sword-shaped leaves featuring dark green banding patterns. Perfect for beginners and low-light spaces.

product7.name: Hoya in Macramé Hanger
product7.description: A gorgeous trailing Hoya plant in a minimalist ceramic pot, elegantly displayed in a handwoven macramé hanger. Adds a boho-chic touch to any room.

product8.name: Marble Queen Pothos
product8.description: A lush and fast-growing trailing plant with stunning green and white marbled leaves. Low-maintenance and ideal for shelves, hangers, or tabletops.

product9.name: Polka Dot Begonia
product9.description: An eye-catching houseplant with deep green leaves beautifully spotted with silver-white dots. A rare and collector-favorite variety that thrives in bright indirect light.

product10.name: Variegated Philodendron
product10.description: A stunning tropical plant featuring large glossy leaves with creamy white and green variegation. A statement piece that brings a lush, jungle feel to any indoor space.
